mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_attachment (notice_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{ossKey}, #{uploadedBy}, NOW())

INSERT INTO notice_attachment (notice_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.noticeId}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.fileUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.ossKey}, #{item.uploadedBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, notice_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at FROM notice_attachment WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, notice_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, oss_key, uploaded_by, created_at FROM notice_attachment WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_attachment SET notice_id = NULL WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
